mapper.insert: INSERT INTO result_papers ( id, user_id, title, pdf_path, paper_type, research_field, author_rank, corresponding_author, journal_name, indexing, publish_date, doi, citation_count, keywords, page_range, project_id, impact_factor, volume_number, issue_number, issn, cn_number, `abstract`, remarks, author_info ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{pdfPath}, #{paperType}, #{researchField}, #{authorRank}, #{correspondingAuthor}, #{journalName}, #{indexing, typeHandler=com.ruoyi.system.TypeHandler.ListTypeHandler}, #{publishDate}, #{doi}, #{citationCount}, #{keywords}, #{pageRange}, #{projectId}, #{impactFactor}, #{volumeNumber}, #{issueNumber}, #{issn}, #{cnNumber}, #{abstractContent}, #{remarks}, #{authorInfo, typeHandler=com.ruoyi.system.TypeHandler.ListTypeHandler} )
mapper.update: UPDATE result_papers SET user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, pdf_path = #{pdfPath}, paper_type = #{paperType}, research_field = #{researchField}, author_rank = #{authorRank}, corresponding_author = #{correspondingAuthor}, journal_name = #{journalName}, indexing = #{indexing, typeHandler=com.ruoyi.system.TypeHandler.ListTypeHandler}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, doi = #{doi}, citation_count = #{citationCount}, keywords = #{keywords}, page_range = #{pageRange}, related_topic = #{relatedTopic}, impact_factor = #{impactFactor}, volume_number = #{volumeNumber}, issue_number = #{issueNumber}, issn = #{issn}, cn_number = #{cnNumber}, `abstract` = #{abstractContent}, remarks = #{remarks}, author_info = #{authorInfo, typeHandler=com.ruoyi.system.TypeHandler.ListTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, pdf_path, paper_type, research_field, author_rank, corresponding_author, journal_name, indexing, publish_date, doi, citation_count, keywords, page_range, related_topic, impact_factor, volume_number, issue_number, issn, cn_number, `abstract`, remarks, author_info FROM papers WHERE id = #{id}
